creator: afb@rpm5.org
text:
The build failed on AMD64 when perl was not installed, and the apidocs generation failed when dot was not installed.

Fix: Attached patch fixes the build by checking for perl and dot.

Patch attached with submission follows:
How-To-Repeat: http://t64.tecnik93.com/logs/7-STABLE-FTP/rpm-5.0.3_1.log
